name: Apricot Almond Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yellow cake mix and butter in a large bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until crumbly.
2. Stir in almonds. Reserve 1 cup of the crumb mixture.
3. Press the remaining crumb mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
4. Carefully spread 1 cup of preserves over the crumb mixture, leaving a 1/4 inch border.
5. Beat cream cheese with an electric mixer until smooth. Add the remaining preserves, sugar, and the next four ingredients, beating well.
6. Carefully spread the cream cheese mixture over the preserves.
7. Combine the reserved crumb mixture and coconut; sprinkle over the cream cheese mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until golden brown and center is set. Cool completely in the baking pan on a wire rack.
9. Cut into squares. Store in the refrigerator.
